title: A warm, safer way to meet lesbian and bi women on the Gulf Coast
intro: Les Bi Gulf Friends is built for real community: gentle onboarding, friendship-first messaging, interest-based groups, and a women-centered experience that feels exciting without overwhelm.

cards.title: Onboard with ease
cards.body: Guide new members through a clear, branded welcome flow before they ever see the member tools.

cards.title: Friends before DMs
cards.body: Keep the vibe calmer and safer by unlocking direct messages only after mutual friendship.

cards.title: Groups that feel human
cards.body: Start with interest-based groups and conversation. Add events, check-ins, and vibe mode later.
